characters.name: SAM
characters.personality: SAM is a determined character whose motives are not yet clear.

dialogue_samples.line: We're going to be fine, guys, we just need to -
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, expression intense and focused.
Medium shot of ABEEHA, walking down the aisle with a tray of snacks.

dialogue_samples.line: Okay, I think I see the map... (looks at map) wait, what's that button do?
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of SAM, expression intense and focused.

characters.name: LEO
characters.personality: LEO is a determined character whose motives are not yet clear.

dialogue_samples.line: Yeah, I think I got it, I just need to -
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, a hint of nervousness in his voice.

dialogue_samples.line: Yeah, we're just trying to... um... navigate.
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, a hint of embarrassment on his face.

dialogue_samples.line: I think it's the... uh... altitude... something.
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, expression intense and focused.

dialogue_samples.line: What? Why didn't you tell me that?
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, a look of horror on his face.

characters.name: ALI
characters.personality: Confident and assertive, Ali is a take-charge individual who values control and competence, possibly with a hint of competitiveness or rivalry with Leo.
characters.appearance: A seasoned pilot with a professional demeanor, Ali has short, neat hair and a clean-shaven face, dressed in a crisp flight suit.
characters.style_reference: A gritty, mid-century modern thriller with a focus on stark, industrial colors and functional design.

dialogue_samples.line: I don't think you do, Leo. Why don't you let me take over?
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his eyes darting between instruments.

dialogue_samples.line: That's the autopilot button, Leo. Don't touch it.
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

characters.name: ABEEHA
characters.personality: ABEEHA is a determined character whose motives are not yet clear.

dialogue_samples.line: Can I get you two anything? We have peanuts, pretzels, or crackers.
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of ABEEHA, expression intense and focused.

style_reference: Classic aviation, 1950s-inspired, with a focus on clean lines, neutral tones, and a sense of nostalgia.

dialogue_samples.line: "Gentlemen, I assure you, we're in good hands. Captain Ali has years of experience."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, a sly grin spreading across his face.

dialogue_samples.line: "Gentlemen, please remain calm. The captain is doing everything he can to keep us safe."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, a whoop of excitement on his lips.

dialogue_samples.line: "Gentlemen, please, no need to apologize. We're just glad to have made it through safely."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, a contrite expression on his face.
